project.name: TextToCAE_3D_Milling_Dynamics
project.prompt: Three-dimensional Abaqus explicit dynamics end-milling simulation with rotating multi-flute cutter, high frame output, and browser playback.

connection.message: Abaqus solved the 3D milling dynamics model and extracted ODB results.

loads.description: Rotating 4-flute milling load, peak tooth force 126.000 N

value.en: 56 x 24 x 8 mm workpiece, 8 mm 4-flute end mill
value.zh: 56 x 24 x 8 mm 工件，8 mm 4 刃立铣刀
9000 rpm，0.035 mm/齿，3 mm 轴向切深

value.en: Fixture sides and bottom constrained; rotating tooth load follows the full-diameter slot
value.zh: 工装侧面与底面约束；旋转刀齿载荷沿全刀径槽扫过

value.en: C3D8R solid elements, 1 mm seed with refined viewport grid
value.zh: C3D8R 三维实体单元，1 mm 种子，并在结果视窗细化网格显示

workflow.detail: The request is mapped to a 3D end-milling explicit dynamic model with tooth passing, feed motion, boundary restraint, and high frame output.
The Abaqus script builds a 3D workpiece, aluminum plastic material, solid mesh, constrained fixture nodes, and tooth-resolved milling loads.
Abaqus/Explicit writes dense transient ODB frames for smooth animation.
The exporter extracts ODB stress and displacement fields and adds the animated cutter, swept slot, and chip stream for browser playback.
